sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ حَامِدٌ بَيْضَةً صَغِيرَةً وَحِيدَةً فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hamid je pronašao jedno malo jaje samo u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: Hamid found a small lone egg in the garden.

sentences.translation: Bila je svijetloplave i lijepe boje.
sentences.translationEn: Its colour was light blue and beautiful.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَ أَبَاهُ وَقَالَ لَهُ: لَا تَلْمَسْهَا، رُبَّمَا بَيْضَةُ طَائِرٍ.
sentences.translation: Obavijestio je oca i rekao mu: Nemoj je dirati, možda je ptičje jaje.
sentences.translationEn: He told his father and he said: Do not touch it, it may be a bird's egg.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ أَيَّامٍ رَأَيَا طَائِرًا صَغِيرًا يَخْرُجُ مِنَ الْبَيْضَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon nekoliko dana vidjeli su malu pticu kako izlazi iz jajeta.
sentences.translationEn: After a few days they saw a small bird coming out of the egg.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ حَامِدٌ وَقَالَ: هَذَا أَجْمَلُ يَوْمٍ فِي حَيَاتِي.
sentences.translation: Hamid se obradovao i rekao: Ovo je najljepši dan u mom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Hamid was happy and said: This is the most beautiful day of my life.
